kiosk.Title: Li'l Abner Motel & Cottages
kiosk.Summary: Simple, comfortable rooms and standalone cottages in the heart of Slade, giving visitors an easy, convenient base just minutes from Natural Bridge and the Red River Gorge.

kiosk.Title: Black Bear Lodge Motel
kiosk.Summary: Simple, comfortable rooms in a quiet, wooded setting near the Red River Gorge, giving visitors an easy, affordable place to stay just minutes from many local attractions.

kiosk.Title: Red River Gorge Inn
kiosk.Summary: Straightforward, affordable lodging in Slade, giving visitors a convenient base close to Natural Bridge, the Gorge, and nearby dining and attractions.
kiosk.Address: 182 Quillens Chapel Service Rd, Campton, KY 41301

kiosk.Title: Three Rivers Inn
kiosk.Summary: A clean, budget‑friendly motel in Beattyville, offering simple rooms, easy parking, and a quiet setting near the confluence of the Kentucky, North Fork, and South Fork rivers
